# terrible_community_general_hwc_vpc_security_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Specifies the security group name. The value is a string of 1 to 64 characters that can contain letters, digits, underscores (`_`), hyphens (`-`), and periods (`.`).

### Optional

- `enterprise_project_id` (String) Specifies the enterprise project ID. When creating a security group, associate the enterprise project ID with the security group.s.
- `state` (String) Whether the given object should exist in Huawei Cloud.
- `vpc_id` (String) Specifies the resource ID of the VPC to which the security group belongs.

### Read-Only

- `rules` (String) Specifies the security group rule, which ensures that resources in the security group can communicate with one another.
